Effect: Repel Magic.name: 效果：排斥魔法 Effect: Repel Magic
Effect: Repel Magic.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.nAC5tdl5sp3shGWF]{驱斥魔法} 授予

你对抗魔法效果的豁免获得+1环境加值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.nAC5tdl5sp3shGWF]{Repel Magic}

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against magical effects.

Effect: Spore Shot.name: 效果：孢子射击 Effect: Spore Shot
Effect: Spore Shot.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.GxtCSjpjbdBk4MlJ]{孢子射击} 授予

你的速度受到–10英尺的环境减值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.GxtCSjpjbdBk4MlJ]{Spore Shot}

You take a –10-foot circumstance penalty to your Speeds.

Effect: Monospore Mimicry.name: 效果：单孢拟态 Effect: Monospore Mimicry
Effect: Monospore Mimicry.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.b5VHlE1Q2RIbW7on]{单孢子拟态} 授予

你获得等同于你等级一半的抗力，以对抗所选元素。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.b5VHlE1Q2RIbW7on]{Monospore Mimicry}

You gain resistance equal to half your level against the chosen element.

Effect: Sheltering Cap.name: 效果：庇护之帽 Effect: Sheltering Cap
Effect: Sheltering Cap.description:
你获得AC+1环境加值。

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC.

Effect: Towering Thicket.name: 效果：高耸灌木丛 Effect: Towering Thicket
Effect: Towering Thicket.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.JliWTCdjEhe3kPrX]{Towering Thicket} 授予

你变为巨型。你的装备随你一同变大。你变为笨拙1，且你的触及增加到15尺。你获得+4状态加值至近战伤害。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.JliWTCdjEhe3kPrX]{Towering Thicket}

You become Huge. Your equipment grows with you. You become clumsy 1 and your reach increases to 15 feet. You gain a +4 status bonus to melee damage.

Effect: Many-Eyed Survey.name: 效果：多眼勘察 Effect: Many-Eyed Survey
Effect: Many-Eyed Survey.description:
你获得全方位视野。

You gain all-around vision.

Effect: Extend Hyphae.name: 效果：延展菌丝 Effect: Extend Hyphae
Effect: Extend Hyphae.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.actions.Item.wdARdD73NPJrWOxl]{延伸菌丝} 授予

你获得颤动感知作为一种模糊感官，射程为80英尺。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.actions.Item.wdARdD73NPJrWOxl]{Extend Hyphae}

You gain tremorsense as an imprecise sense with a range of 80 feet.
